Aftershock trigger When you discard the card without playing it
Stuff like end of turn
yea i didnt realize that
Or forced discard from other card or exalt effects
i never thought about NOT playing the card 😆
Be careful tho
Some have exhaust attached on them
You play them = it won't appear
Meanwhile
Some have fleeting
You don't play them = it won't appear
Exhaust can still appear if you don't play them
That's why stuff like corpo or aurita card's can appear again in your hand
And clog it
Even though their aftershocks are good

this is what i used in dtide this week

it's not amazing or anything, and the wheels are a mess because i had to build 4 other teams

but if i can clear alert 3 with this, you can clear chapter 7 with it

so to be clear my advice is

- replace gdoll with karen

- change posse to Mouse's Wisdom

- get covenants:
    - Crimson Pulse on Tawil (Dreams of Medicine later once you can buy it)
   - Re-evolution or Deus Ex Machina on Karen
   - Scarlet Embrace on Ryker
   - Life Drain on Ramona

- karen's wheels should be Emerge & Gluttony
- replace tawil's SR wheel with Analysis of Death
- replace ryker's SSR wheel with a crit wheel and SR wheel with Critical Point
- replace ramona's SR wheel with Frenzy

- raise all your strike and defense to level 3
i think tawil is your best team so you don't have to switch to a different team, just need to learn how to play tawil

Tawil:
CoV(Covenant): Dreams of Medicine, or Crimson Pulse

WoDs: Wheel Unseen + To My Dearest Friend/Critical Point

Inferno:
CoV: Re-Evolution

WoDs: Inferno Sig + Duty Gravitas(Current Setup)

Ryker:
CoV: Scarlet Embrace

WoDs: Crit Rate WoDs - Analysis of Death/Hand of Oblivion(Sell the Extra Strike) - A Golden SSR WoD with Crit Rate would work better but idk if you have such

TRamona:
CoV: Life Drain

WoDs: Keyflare WoDs - Elevated Focus is prob the best Purple SR Keyflare WoD, and the Golden WoD is your choice

Posse: Mouse Wisdom or Festival of Tides

You can run Frenzy + Gluttony and replace Ryker and/or Inferno WoDs. 

MonoTawil is all about Posse-ing as much as possible, twice a turn. Searching for “Pre-Determined Strike”(TRamona 3 cost) with Tawil Exalt and Omniscient Verity can randomly copy. TRamona’s 3 cost scales off STR and the number of times you Posse-d this fight. Furthermore, as a Mono Chaos + Comp, your turns should take six years with alot of drawing and Arithma Manipulation/Gain + Keyflare Gen which allows you to kill the enemy before you take too much damage. Remember Keyflare is gained based on Keyflare Stat + Amount of Arithma consumed. Tawil gameplay is basically using TRamona and Ryker to stack Wings via Pinion Drawing for a Burst Turn, however I would say this will be harder without “Dreams of Medicine” CoV, and Hameln. Thus your damage will come from “Predetermined Strikes” from Tawil Exalt/Omni Verity, and TRamona.
in arc 1 you dont even need predetermined strike, just spamming wings is enough for all fights

Castor: umbral flight > defense > strike > rouse > stygian wings > exalt. Rouse is skippable if you aren't rousing him

Murphy: vortex revealed > divine maiden's birth. you can leave the others at level 3
